steps.title: Isolate c
steps.content: Since $42f$ is multiplied by $c$, divide both sides by $42f$: $c=\frac{b}{42f}$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The equation $c=\frac{b}{42f}$ matches the correct answer, A.

steps.title: Use division because c is multiplied
steps.content: In $b=42cf$, the factors next to $c$ are $42$ and $f$. Dividing by the full product $42f$ leaves $c$ alone on one side.
